title: dianthus strictus
intro: Dianthus strictus, also known as the Chinese pink or strict pink, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carnation family and is native to China and the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Dianthus strictus include reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-aging effects. The herbal preparations of Dianthus strictus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed internally or used topically to apply its medicinal properties.
